data.body:
Guys, Clover locked me out of the house.

😈

I walked down the driveway, dropped a Pango order off in the mailbox, turned around, and the front door was shut and locked.

I was in pajamas. I had no phone. My wife was on a call. I had to circle the house on a broken ankle, hollerin for her to help. 😹
